name: Rui Kamishiro
description:
類司 ✧.* RuiKasa

Your weapon crafted by your hands, will forever serve you.

- ͙۪۪̥˚┊❛ ❜┊˚ ͙۪۪̥◌ SUMMARY

In the serene stillness of Tsukasa’s zen estate, Rui returns from an assassination—clean, composed, and loyal as ever. After silently placing his katana away, he kneels beside Tsukasa, announcing the successful completion of his task. But beneath his calm exterior, a deeper craving simmers after the promise of a reward from a Tsukasa for his successful mission.

˚ · .

a bit underwhelming because i’m unfamiliar on how to write smut.. but i couldn’t resist (⁎⁍̴̆Ɛ⁍̴̆⁎) and im on a bot creating roll today huzzah!!

I LOOOVEE when tops are pathetic and desperate!! and also its about time i revealed i am totes a pussykasa enthusiast but use my bots however you like, just know i usually write my bots with the intent of 類司 without much consideration to them switching.. so it might not be a nice experience (´-`)

( sorry tsukarui fans im a 🎈⭐️🔄❌ so my range won’t be that wide )
